company.name: Abivax SA
company.subtitle: Post-Phase 3 UC induction · Maintenance data Q2 2026 · NDA filing H2 2026

market.notes: UC drug market ~$8B (2024) → $11-14B (2032). Obefazimod is oral, first-in-class miR-124 enhancer. Phase 3 ABTECT induction positive (Jul 2025): pooled 16.4% placebo-adj response (p<0.0001), 1275 patients randomized. 678/1275 entered maintenance. Favorable tolerability, no new safety signals. Competitors: Entyvio (vedolizumab), Stelara (ustekinumab), Rinvoq (upadacitinib), Zeposia (ozanimod), Velsipity (etrasimod).

us.patientsK.note: Crohn's & Colitis Foundation: ~700K US UC; slightly more common than CD; Mayo score severity index.

eu.patientsK.note: ECCO: ~1.5M EU27+UK UC; higher prevalence than CD in most registries; Nordic countries peak incidence.

row.patientsK.note: Global ex-US/EU ~3M UC; Japan highest Asian prevalence; China/India rising rapidly.

us.wtpPct.note: ~62% -- Medicare/commercial cover full biologic ladder + JAKi (Rinvoq/Xeljanz) + S1P (Zeposia/Velsipity); 5-ASA first-line.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- NICE/G-BA stepwise; infliximab biosim preferred; Entyvio/Stelara/Rinvoq 2L+.

row.wtpPct.note: ~12% -- 5-ASA/steroids dominant; Japan adds biologics; biosimilars accelerating access.

us.priceK.note: Blended $55K: Humira biosim $18K + Entyvio $65K + Stelara $75K + Rinvoq $65K + Zeposia $85K; mesalamine generic $3K.

row.priceK.note: ~$8K -- mesalamine + biosim anti-TNF in upper-middle income markets.

penPct.note: ~35% peak -- advanced therapy shift; S1P oral convenience + JAKi speed of onset.

us.reachPct.note: Phase 3 positive; oral miR-124 enhancer, differentiated MoA vs JAKi/biologics in mod-severe UC

us.wtpPct.note: US drug-specific WTP 45% -- estimated launch WTP pending Phase 3 + label

eu.reachPct.note: EU reach 7% of 1500K; EMA pathway at phase3

eu.wtpPct.note: EU drug-specific WTP 32% -- EMA path pending Phase 3; HTA gating expected

eu.priceK.note: EU net $25K/yr post-HTA (~50-60% of US list typical)

row.reachPct.note: ROW reach 2% of 3000K; ex-US/EU access lags by years at phase3

row.wtpPct.note: ROW drug-specific WTP 10% -- ROW access limited to Japan + select APAC at launch

row.priceK.note: ROW blended $10K/yr -- Japan near EU, emerging markets lower via tiered pricing

market.notes: CD drug market comparable to UC. ENHANCE-CD 12-week induction data expected Q4 2026. Anti-fibrotic activity shown preclinically (ECCO 2026: ~60-90% reduction in fibrosis score). Fibrosis is a key unmet need in CD — could be a differentiator if confirmed clinically.

us.patientsK.note: Crohn's & Colitis Foundation: ~800K US CD; CDC NHIS ~3M IBD total; peak onset 15-35yr.

eu.patientsK.note: ECCO registry: ~1.3M EU27+UK CD; Scandinavia highest incidence; Northern Europe gradient.

row.patientsK.note: Global ex-US/EU ~2M CD; rising incidence in newly industrialized (China, India, Brazil).

us.wtpPct.note: ~65% -- Medicare Part B infusions (Remicade/Entyvio) + Part D Humira/Stelara/Rinvoq SC/oral; biosimilars expanding.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~48% -- NICE/G-BA cover anti-TNF + IL-23 + S1P; ~80% adalimumab biosimilar share; infliximab biosim dominant.

row.wtpPct.note: ~12% -- Japan J-DPS covers biologics; China NRDL added adalimumab biosim; LatAm biosimilar-led.

us.priceK.note: Blended $62K: Humira biosim $18K + Stelara $75K + Entyvio $65K + Skyrizi $80K + Rinvoq $65K; 5-ASA/steroids generics.

eu.priceK.note: ~$30K blended -- adalimumab biosim ~$8K net + Stelara ~$35K + Entyvio ~$30K.

row.priceK.note: ~$10K -- biosimilars + 5-ASA generics; Japan closer to EU pricing.

penPct.note: ~38% peak -- sequential biologic/JAKi cycling; moderate-severe shift to advanced therapy earlier.

us.reachPct.note: Phase 2b ENHANCE-CD; Crohn's is second indication for obefazimod

us.wtpPct.note: US drug-specific WTP 30% -- early forecast; awaits Phase 3 confirmatory data

eu.reachPct.note: EU reach 3% of 1300K; EMA pathway at phase2

eu.wtpPct.note: EU drug-specific WTP 22% -- EU access TBD; EMA pathway unclear at stage

eu.priceK.note: EU net $25K/yr post-HTA (~50-60% of US list typical)

row.reachPct.note: ROW reach 1% of 2000K; ex-US/EU access lags by years at phase2

row.wtpPct.note: ROW drug-specific WTP 8% -- ROW access limited to Japan + select APAC at launch

row.priceK.note: ROW blended $10K/yr -- Japan near EU, emerging markets lower via tiered pricing

mega_bear.narrative: Maintenance data fails — NDA collapses — back to €5
events: ✗ 44-week maintenance shows complete loss of response
✗ NDA cannot be filed — back to square one
✗ miR-124 mechanism questioned — no durability
→ Stock reverts to pre-Phase 3 levels (€5-10), needs to raise capital

bear.narrative: Maintenance fails or underwhelms + CD disappoints
events: ✗ 44-week maintenance data shows significant efficacy loss
✗ FDA pushes back on NDA — requests additional data or longer follow-up
✗ ENHANCE-CD induction misses in Crohn's
→ Stock re-rates to pre-Phase 3 levels, pipeline credibility damaged

base.narrative: UC maintenance confirms induction + CD shows signal
events: ✓ 44-week maintenance data positive — durable remission
✓ NDA filed H2 2026, MAA in parallel
~ ENHANCE-CD 12-week data shows encouraging signal
→ UC approval mid-2027, commercial launch H2 2027
✓ Maintenance shows class-leading durability + safety
✓ FDA grants Priority Review — approval H1 2027
✓ ENHANCE-CD hits, establishing IBD franchise
✓ Anti-fibrotic angle differentiates from JAK/S1P — M&A target

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Best-in-class IBD franchise — UC + CD + anti-fibrotic platform — AbbVie/Roche acquires
events: ✓ Maintenance shows deepening response + class-leading safety
✓ FDA grants Priority Review — approval H1 2027
✓ ENHANCE-CD hits — oral IBD franchise across UC + CD
✓ Anti-fibrotic mechanism validated clinically — AbbVie/Roche acquires at €200+

lastData.title: ABTECT Phase 3 induction — UC (positive)
points: Pooled 16.4% placebo-adjusted clinical response (p<0.0001) at 8 weeks
1,275 patients randomized — one of the largest UC Phase 3 programs ever
Favorable tolerability, no new safety signals
22 abstracts at ECCO 2026 — subgroup analyses, biomarkers, anti-fibrotic data
miR-124 upregulation confirmed + IL-17A, IL-6 reduction toward homeostasis
Preclinical: 60-90% fibrosis score reduction (oral presentation ECCO 2026)
Stock went from ~€5 to €90+ on the data

nextCatalyst.title: ABTECT 44-week maintenance data (UC)
thresholds: Primary: durability of clinical response/remission at week 44
Key: remission rate in maintenance vs re-randomized placebo
This is THE gating event for NDA filing (planned H2 2026)

risks: Maintenance data is binary — if durability fades, NDA collapses
UC market is crowded (Rinvoq, Entyvio, Stelara, Zeposia, Velsipity)
Stock ran from €5 to €90+ on induction alone — maintenance is priced in to some degree
No commercial infrastructure yet — will need to build or partner
Single-asset company (obefazimod for UC + CD, same molecule)
Crohn's disease Phase 2b data not until Q4 2026
Anti-fibrotic data is preclinical only — clinical translation uncertain
Cash runway Q4 2027 — may need to raise if NDA delayed
